outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected. Total GEX deeply negative (-5.46B combined) indicates aggressive short-gamma regime. Dealers will amplify all directional moves. Stay nimble.
outlook.summary: Extreme bearish positioning across all expiries with PCR ratios escalating from 1.76 (0DTE) to 4.09 (MONTHLY). Volatility smirk (1.28-1.42 skew ratio) confirms fear premium on puts. Price pinned at Weekly Max Pain (656). Critical structural support at 630 RESONANCE level. Upside capped by 660 Call Wall confluence. Negative gamma environment favors sharp moves - expect dealer hedging to accelerate any break of key levels.

Strong PUT OI across all expiries (29K/23K/100K). Secondary structural support above 630 wall. High 0DTE volume (55K) indicates active intraday defense. First line of support in selloff.
